title: thlaspi spinosum
intro: Thlaspi spinosum, also known as prickly orpine, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its prickly leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi spinosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Thlaspi spinosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
